2026.notes: First public beta. A near-complete rework of the develop engine: smarter auto-develop (need-based Dehaze + Clarity), natural highlight/shadow recovery (no more flat 'painted' look or coloured blotches), perceptually-even Saturation, Light Shaping (beta), and photo-matched denoise Sharpness. It's a beta — please report anything that looks off.
